rows.name: Hall Effect / Rapid Trigger
rows.note: Keychron V6 Ultra HE VIP reservation opened June 15 with Nova Socket hybrid-switch tech. Hall effect now treated as baseline expectation on new gaming board launches per W26 roundups.

rows.name: HMX Cloud V2
rows.note: Broadly in stock across iLumKB, Milktooth, LumeKeebs, and Eloquent Clicks. No new review catalyst this week; shelf-arrival plateau continues into W26.

rows.name: Gateron Oil King
rows.note: Community benchmark linear at $0.90 per switch. No new reviews or restocks in W26. Steady evergreen discussion with no catalyst to move the needle.

rows.name: Gateron Lanes
rows.note: Prototypist carries in-stock units shipping within 3 days. ThereminGoat review lift from W25 fading to steady state; no fresh review catalyst in W26.

rows.name: Cherry MX2A
rows.note: Slow community sentiment bleed continues as Hall effect alternatives dominate new board specs. No MX2A product launch or review to arrest the decline in W26.

rows.name: GMK CYL Masterpiece R2
rows.note: GB closes June 26 — final-day urgency peak via NovelKeys, KBDfans, Oblotzky, Prototypist, Geon Works. New Katakana legends on nav cluster cited as key upgrade over R1.

rows.name: GMK CYL Pandemonium
rows.note: GB active June 1–July 1 via DeltaKeyCo, Prototypist, Bowl Keyboards, and others. Mid-window plateau; Berserk eclipse-themed translucent set maintaining steady interest.

rows.name: DCS Dolch
rows.note: GB active June 1–July 1 via Divinikey. Signature Plastics DCS profile; pricing tiers unlock on final quantity. Steady mid-window activity with no new community flashpoint.

rows.name: GMK CYL Selene
rows.note: GB closed June 19 as scheduled. Post-close fade now active; community attention shifts to open GBs. Production queue wait begins — estimated Q4 2026 fulfillment.

rows.name: GMK CYL Prussian Alert
rows.note: Closed June 12; post-close fade accelerating two weeks out. No shipping or production update to re-engage community. Score continues descent from W25 peak.

rows.name: GMK CYL Ramune
rows.note: Closed June 5; post-close fade continues with no production update. No community re-engagement catalyst in W26. Score erosion steady.

rows.name: Split / Ergo
rows.note: Keychron Orca Echo crowdfunding raised 170M yen from 6,501 backers in half a day from June 19 Gizmart launch. Biggest split keyboard funding event of 2026 so far.

rows.name: 75% Layout
rows.note: Steady evergreen interest; no major new 75% board launch in W26. IQUNIX EC75 Computex halo fully faded. Dominant enthusiast form factor by volume with minimal directional movement.

rows.name: Alice layout
rows.note: Continued slow bleed as ergo-curious buyers pivot to true split boards. Orca Echo launch amplifies the trend away from Alice as a compromise form factor.

rows.name: Mode Designs
rows.note: Prologue 98% targeting Summer 2026 — prototype testing updates posted this week. Crown Mounting System commentary still circulating. No concrete new GB announcement in W26.

rows.name: CannonKeys
rows.note: GMK Spark closed June 21 and Link closed June 15 — both major GBs now post-close. No new GB launch announced to replace the pipeline. Vendor entering a quiet window.

rows.name: Prototypist
rows.note: Summer Sale launched June 19–28: 40% off all items with £50 spend. GMK Pandemonium and Gateron Lanes in-stock also live. Sale timing adds traffic and sentiment lift in W26.

rows.name: Keychron
rows.note: Orca Echo crowdfunding raised 170M yen with 6,501 backers in half a day from June 19. V6 Ultra HE VIP reservation also opened June 15 with Nova Socket hybrid tech. Strongest Keychron week of 2026.

rows.name: Wuque Studio
rows.note: Mammoth V2 and Promise V2 listed as in-development on product updates page. No new announcement or IC launched in W26. Post-anniversary-sale dip continues at a slow bleed rate.

rows.name: Cherry (GMK parent)
rows.note: GMK production backlog for Selene, Pandemonium, and Masterpiece R2 keeps brand present but passive. MX2A switch headwinds from Hall effect segment continue with no positive catalyst in W26.
